extracted_information: JSFiddle is an online code playground designed for web development, enabling users to write, test, and share HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code. It offers a rich set of features, including an advanced code editor, real-time preview (hot-reloading), AI-powered code completion, and support for various frameworks and preprocessors.

supported_technologies_and_languages: CSS (including CSS Grid, Flexbox, SCSS, PostCSS, Tailwind CSS)
JavaScript (including jQuery, React, React JSX, Preact, TypeScript, CoffeeScript, JS Modules)

pricing.ai_code_completion_api_key: Free (requires user-provided API key, described as obtainable for free)
pricing.general_platform_access: No explicit pricing or subscription details are mentioned in the provided content, implying free access.

features.name: CSS Flexbox Generator App
features.description: An integrated application for generating CSS Flexbox layouts, simplifying complex property usage. Heavily inspired by flexer.dev.

features.name: External Resources Injection
features.description: External resources (e.g., libraries, stylesheets) are injected as <LINK> or <SCRIPT> tags directly into the HTML panel.

features.name: Contextual Code Completion
features.description: Code completion provides intelligent suggestions based on the context of all active code panels (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).

features.name: AI Code Completion (Beta)
features.description: AI-powered code suggestions utilizing the Codestral model by Mistral; requires a user's own (free) API key.

features.name: Performance Enhancement
features.description: Achieved faster loading times by reducing the JavaScript bundle size by approximately 30% through the removal of legacy MooTools dependencies.

features.name: Fiddle Version Expiration
features.description: Users can set specific expiration dates for their fiddles from preset options (1 day, 10 days, 1 month, 6 months, 1 year, or keep forever); 'Keep forever' is the current default.

features.name: Fiddle Download Capability
features.description: Allows downloading a specific fiddle version as a single zipped HTML file directly from the editor interface.

features.name: Recent Fiddles for Logged-Out Users
features.description: Temporarily stores anonymous fiddles for logged-out users in a 'Your recent fiddles' modal in the sidebar, allowing time to save them after logging in.

features.name: Tailwind CSS Precompiler Support
features.description: Integrated support for Tailwind CSS, activated via the CSS panel dropdown, and optimized for use with HTML Hot-reload.

features.name: Modern Code Linting and Formatting
features.description: Utilizes updated tools like Stylelint for code linting and Prettier for code formatting.

features.name: JSFiddle 3.0 UI Refresh
features.description: Significant user interface update with a modern design, re-engineered front-end moving away from pre-processors, and native support for light/dark themes using `light-dark()` CSS function.

features.name: Integrated Mini-Apps
features.description: New sidebar includes mini-applications, such as a Color Palette Generator.

features.name: System Theme Following
features.description: The platform's theme dynamically adjusts to match the user's operating system settings.

features.name: CSS Hot-reload
features.description: Provides instant updates to CSS styles in the result panel as code is typed.

features.name: HTML Hot-reload (Experimental)
features.description: Offers real-time updates to HTML content in the result panel as code is typed.

features.name: Themed Results Panel
features.description: The results panel's color scheme synchronizes with the selected editor theme.

features.name: Unified Title and Description
features.description: Fiddle title and description fields have been merged into a single input for simplicity.

features.name: Redesigned Public Profile Page
features.description: A revamped public profile page that can serve as a customizable code showcase.

features.name: Enhanced Collections (formerly Groups)
features.description: Completely redesigned system for organizing fiddles into collections, with direct creation from the editor and future development plans.

features.name: Fiddle Module Import
features.description: Enables importing code from one fiddle into another as JavaScript modules (`import [name] from '@jsfiddle/[username]/[fiddle].js'`) or CSS imports (`@import url('@jsfiddle/[username]/[fiddle].css')`).

features.name: Latest Fiddle Version Display
features.description: Fiddle listings (Public, Private, Titled, etc.) now prioritize displaying the most recent saved versions instead of older base versions.
